If you’re in the Oracle Park area and looking for amazing food, Frankie’s Java House is the spot! We went on the San Francisco Giants tour and asked our guide Renee, for a local recommendation. Without hesitation, she told us to head straight to Frankie’s, and she couldn’t have been more right.

The food was fresh and absolutely delicious. On top of that, the atmosphere was welcoming and fun. A special shout-out to Zach, the bartender, who went above and beyond with these teachers from New Jersey. Zach was friendly, attentive, and gave us great tips about the city that made our visit even better.

We left full, happy, and already talking about coming back. Highly recommend this place 100%. Don’t miss it if you’re near Oracle Park you’ll be glad you stopped by Frankie’s!
